summary: Frontend testing of /minted-photos Card View scrolling fixes. Found CRITICAL BUG: Flip button opens ImageLightbox instead of flipping card in place. Most other features verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: 'Tap to flip' button opens ImageLightbox instead of flipping card in place. e.stopPropagation() not preventing event bubbling to parent onClick handler.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot verify nav bar return after unflip because flip button opens lightbox instead of flipping card

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: In UnifiedPhotoCard.jsx, the flip button's onClick handler has e.stopPropagation() but it's not preventing the parent card's onClick from firing. Need to investigate why event propagation is not being stopped.
Possible fix: Add e.preventDefault() along with e.stopPropagation(), or use a different event handling approach
Alternative: Move the flip button outside the clickable card area, or use pointer-events to isolate it
critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedPhotoCard.jsx line 502-505: The flip button has e.stopPropagation() but parent onClick still fires. This could be due to React's synthetic event system or the button being inside a div with onClick.
The parent div at line 884 has onClick={handleClick} which calls onClick?.(photo) - this opens the lightbox in MintedPhotos.jsx

success_rate.frontend: 80% - Most features work but flip button has critical bug

context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical bug: Flip button opens lightbox instead of flipping card. Need to fix event propagation in UnifiedPhotoCard.jsx. All other features (Grid View hidden, Card View default, dimming, z-index, touch scrolling CSS) verified working.

grid_view_hidden.details: Grid View and List View buttons are completely hidden from UI. Only Card View button (LayoutGrid icon) is visible.

card_view_default.details: viewMode defaults to 'card', 12 photo cards displayed on page load.

card_layout_order.details: Card front layout: Photo Image -> Name -> Dollar Value & Stars -> Scenery & Level -> Stamina -> 'Tap to flip' button

touch_scrolling_css.details: body/html/card have touch-action: pan-y. Card images have pointer-events: none. CSS rules in index.css correct.

z_index_100_flipped.details: Flipped card gets z-index: 100 (verified via JS evaluation). Other cards have z-index: auto or 1.

backdrop_overlay.details: Dark overlay (bg-black/60) appears when card is flipped. Clicking backdrop should dismiss flipped card.

other_cards_dimmed.details: 11 out of 12 cards have opacity: 0.3 and pointer-events: none when one card is flipped.

nav_bar_hides_when_flipped.details: Cannot verify because flip button opens lightbox instead of flipping card. Code review shows NavContext.setHideNav(true) is called when flippedCardId is set.

nav_bar_returns_after_unflip.details: Cannot verify because flip button opens lightbox instead of flipping card.

flipped_card_back_scrollable.details: Cannot verify because flip button opens lightbox instead of flipping card. Code review shows back content has overflow-y: auto and touch handlers.

bug_details.title: Flip button opens ImageLightbox instead of flipping card
reproduction_steps: 2. Click 'Tap to flip' button on any card
3. EXPECTED: Card flips in place showing back with stats
4. ACTUAL: ImageLightbox opens showing full-screen image
bug_details.root_cause: e.stopPropagation() in flip button onClick handler is not preventing event from bubbling to parent card's onClick handler which opens lightbox
